calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-15-2012 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Set For Trial On Apr-02-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-17-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Timothy M. Thornton, Esq., from Nelsen, Thompson, Pegue & Thornton, 310-315-1001, for Defendant and moving party
John C. McCaslin, Esq., Law Offices, 916-200-8455, for Plaintiff and opposing party

Argued and the Court ruled as follows:
DEFENDANT PRAETORIAN INSURANCE COMPANY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to defendant York Claims Service.
Defendants' demurrer to complaint is overruled as to defendant Praetorian Insurance Company, with 10 days leave to answer. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
